3518286241.name: Queensfoil Censer
3518286241.description:
Works best with:
Elements: [Solar] [Stasis] [Strand]
Weapons: [Rocket Launcher] [Grenade Launcher] [Special Grenade Launcher]

tier1Perks.name: Fever and Chill
tier1Perks.description: Rapid precision hits with [Solar]Solar weapons grant Radiant. Rapid precision hits with [Stasis]Stasis weapons grant Frost Armor.

tier1Perks.name: Torch
tier1Perks.description: While radiant, deal increased weapon damage to combatants affected by Strand and Stasis debuffs.

tier1Perks.name: Heart of the Flame
tier1Perks.description: Casting your Solar Super grants nearby allies radiant and increases the damage of your Super for each nearby ally.

tier1Perks.name: Armorsmith
tier1Perks.description: Breaking a combatant's shield temporarily grants you damage resistance and increased melee damage.

tier1Perks.name: Wished into Being
tier1Perks.description: While your Super is nearly fully-charged, ability final blows spawn Orbs of Power.

tier1Perks.name: Kindling Trigger
tier1Perks.description: Radiant causes Solar weapons to apply scorch to unscorched combatants.

tier1Perks.name: Blast Radius
tier1Perks.description: Rapid final blows with Rocket Launchers and Grenade Launchers grant Armor Charge.

tier2Perks.name: Unraveling Orbs
tier2Perks.description: Picking up an Orb of Power or a Tangle grants [Strand]Strand weapons Unraveling Rounds.

tier2Perks.name: Pillar of Ice
tier2Perks.description: Defeating a frozen target spawns Stasis crystals.

tier2Perks.name: Revitalizing Blast
tier2Perks.description: Stunning a Champion causes it to ignite and clears your shield stun.

tier2Perks.name: Anti-Champion Nosecone
tier2Perks.description: Rocket Launchers deal increased damage to Champions.

tier2Perks.name: Dragon's Bite
tier2Perks.description: Breaking a combatant's shield with a Strand or Stasis weapon has a chance to suspend or freeze that combatant.

tier2Perks.name: Creeping Chill
tier2Perks.description: Stasis final blows against slowed or frozen targets release a burst that slows combatants and grants Frost Armor to allies caught in the blast.

tier2Perks.name: Perpetual Destruction
tier2Perks.description: Rapid final blows with non-Exotic Rocket Launchers refund ammo and increase reload speed for a short duration.

tier2Perks.name: Fever and Chill
tier2Perks.description: Rapid precision hits with [Solar]Solar weapons grant Radiant. Rapid precision hits with [Stasis]Stasis weapons grant Frost Armor.

tier2Perks.name: Torch
tier2Perks.description: While radiant, deal increased weapon damage to combatants affected by Strand and Stasis debuffs.

tier2Perks.name: Heart of the Flame
tier2Perks.description: Casting your Solar Super grants nearby allies radiant and increases the damage of your Super for each nearby ally.

tier2Perks.name: Armorsmith
tier2Perks.description: Breaking a combatant's shield temporarily grants you damage resistance and increased melee damage.

tier2Perks.name: Wished into Being
tier2Perks.description: While your Super is nearly fully-charged, ability final blows spawn Orbs of Power.

tier2Perks.name: Kindling Trigger
tier2Perks.description: Radiant causes Solar weapons to apply scorch to unscorched combatants.

tier2Perks.name: Blast Radius
tier2Perks.description: Rapid final blows with Rocket Launchers and Grenade Launchers grant Armor Charge.

tier3Perks.name: Horde Shuttle
tier3Perks.description: Damaging unraveled targets with a weapon occasionally spawns a Threadling. Threadlings sever targets that they damage.

tier3Perks.name: Hail The Storm
tier3Perks.description:
Shattering frozen targets and Stasis crystals deals increased damage.

Shattering Stasis crystals releases shards of ice that damage and slow targets.

tier3Perks.name: Rays of Precision
tier3Perks.description: While radiant, Solar precision final blows cause combatants to ignite.

tier3Perks.name: Solo Operative
tier3Perks.description: While you are the only member of your fireteam, precision weapon final blows increase weapon damage until you are defeated.

tier3Perks.name: Argent Ordnance
tier3Perks.description: Firing a Rocket Launcher consumes one stack of Armor Charge, granting increased damage and reload speed until you reload or stow your Rocket Launcher.

tier3Perks.name: Frigid Glare
tier3Perks.description: While Frost Armor is active, [Stasis]Stasis precision final blows cause combatants to release a freezing burst.

tier3Perks.name: To Shreds
tier3Perks.description: Dealing sustained damage to severed targets unravels them. Defeating a severed target creates a hotspot of Strand energy, granting Woven Mail to nearby allies for a short duration.

tier3Perks.name: Unraveling Orbs
tier3Perks.description: Picking up an Orb of Power or a Tangle grants [Strand]Strand weapons Unraveling Rounds.

tier3Perks.name: Pillar of Ice
tier3Perks.description: Defeating a frozen target spawns Stasis crystals.

tier3Perks.name: Revitalizing Blast
tier3Perks.description: Stunning a Champion causes it to ignite and clears your shield stun.

tier3Perks.name: Anti-Champion Nosecone
tier3Perks.description: Rocket Launchers deal increased damage to Champions.

tier3Perks.name: Dragon's Bite
tier3Perks.description: Breaking a combatant's shield with a Strand or Stasis weapon has a chance to suspend or freeze that combatant.

tier3Perks.name: Creeping Chill
tier3Perks.description: Stasis final blows against slowed or frozen targets release a burst that slows combatants and grants Frost Armor to allies caught in the blast.

tier3Perks.name: Perpetual Destruction
tier3Perks.description: Rapid final blows with non-Exotic Rocket Launchers refund ammo and increase reload speed for a short duration.

tier3Perks.name: Fever and Chill
tier3Perks.description: Rapid precision hits with [Solar]Solar weapons grant Radiant. Rapid precision hits with [Stasis]Stasis weapons grant Frost Armor.

tier3Perks.name: Torch
tier3Perks.description: While radiant, deal increased weapon damage to combatants affected by Strand and Stasis debuffs.

tier3Perks.name: Heart of the Flame
tier3Perks.description: Casting your Solar Super grants nearby allies radiant and increases the damage of your Super for each nearby ally.

tier3Perks.name: Armorsmith
tier3Perks.description: Breaking a combatant's shield temporarily grants you damage resistance and increased melee damage.

tier3Perks.name: Wished into Being
tier3Perks.description: While your Super is nearly fully-charged, ability final blows spawn Orbs of Power.

tier3Perks.name: Kindling Trigger
tier3Perks.description: Radiant causes Solar weapons to apply scorch to unscorched combatants.

tier3Perks.name: Blast Radius
tier3Perks.description: Rapid final blows with Rocket Launchers and Grenade Launchers grant Armor Charge.

1504442987.name: NPA Repulsion Regulator
1504442987.description:
Works best with:
Elements: [Arc] [Void] [Strand]
Weapons: [Glaive] [Auto Rifle]

tier1Perks.name: Improved Unraveling
tier1Perks.description: Increases the amount of damage dealt by unraveling a target.

tier1Perks.name: Volatile Flow
tier1Perks.description: Picking up an Orb of Power grants your Void weapons Volatile rounds.

tier1Perks.name: Unto the Breach
tier1Perks.description: Defeating a Void debuffed target creates a Void Breach while your Void or Prismatic subclass is equipped.

tier1Perks.name: Amped Up
tier1Perks.description: Stay amplified longer while your Arc or Prismatic subclass is equipped.

tier1Perks.name: Thunderous Retort
tier1Perks.description: Grants bonus Arc Super damage if cast while critically wounded or while amplified. Lasts until the end of the Super activation.

tier1Perks.name: Sustained Fire
tier1Perks.description: Continuously damaging combatants or healing allies with an Auto Rifle grants you damage resistance.

tier1Perks.name: Shatter Orbs
tier1Perks.description: The first time you break a combatant's shield, you create an Orb of Power if you break the shield with the matching damage type.

tier2Perks.name: Strand Soldier
tier2Perks.description: Your Strand weapons gain Unraveling Rounds whenever you gain Woven Mail while your Strand or Prismatic subclass is equipped.

tier2Perks.name: Suppressing Glaive
tier2Perks.description: Damaging combatants with your Glaive suppresses them, preventing them from using abilities for a short time.

tier2Perks.name: Protective Breach
tier2Perks.description: Picking up a Void Breach gives you an overshield or refreshes your existing overshield.

tier2Perks.name: Counter Charge
tier2Perks.description: Gain a stack of Armor Charge when you stun a Champion.

tier2Perks.name: Bricks from Beyond
tier2Perks.description: Defeating a powerful combatant with a Void weapon has a chance to generate Heavy ammo progress for you and your teammates.

tier2Perks.name: Overload Grenades
tier2Perks.description: Void grenades disrupt combatants, stunning them, delaying ability energy regeneration and lowering combatant damage output. Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions.

tier2Perks.name: Targeting Autoloader
tier2Perks.description:
While you have an Auto Rifle equipped, defeating combatants reloads your equipped weapon and temporarily increases weapon damage. 

Awards bonus progress when dealing final blows while surrounded.

tier2Perks.name: Improved Unraveling
tier2Perks.description: Increases the amount of damage dealt by unraveling a target.

tier2Perks.name: Volatile Flow
tier2Perks.description: Picking up an Orb of Power grants your Void weapons Volatile rounds.

tier2Perks.name: Unto the Breach
tier2Perks.description: Defeating a Void debuffed target creates a Void Breach while your Void or Prismatic subclass is equipped.

tier2Perks.name: Amped Up
tier2Perks.description: Stay amplified longer while your Arc or Prismatic subclass is equipped.

tier2Perks.name: Thunderous Retort
tier2Perks.description: Grants bonus Arc Super damage if cast while critically wounded or while amplified. Lasts until the end of the Super activation.

tier2Perks.name: Sustained Fire
tier2Perks.description: Continuously damaging combatants or healing allies with an Auto Rifle grants you damage resistance.

tier2Perks.name: Shatter Orbs
tier2Perks.description: The first time you break a combatant's shield, you create an Orb of Power if you break the shield with the matching damage type.

tier3Perks.name: Conductive Cosmic Needle
tier3Perks.description: Targets affected by Strand debuffs take increased damage from Arc and Void abilities.

tier3Perks.name: Shock and Awe
tier3Perks.description: Arc final blows while you are amplified summon a burst of lightning that damages and jolts targets.

tier3Perks.name: Supernova
tier3Perks.description: Picking up a Void Breach causes your next source of Void damage to create a large weakening pulse.

tier3Perks.name: Squad Goals
tier3Perks.description:
Performing a finisher while you are amplified grants Amplified to nearby allies. 

Performing a finisher while you have Woven Mail grants Woven Mail to nearby allies. 

Performing a finisher while you have Devour grants Devour to nearby allies.

tier3Perks.name: Lightning Strikes Twice
tier3Perks.description: After throwing an Arc grenade, gain increased grenade recharge for a short time. Arc final blows extend the duration of this benefit.

tier3Perks.name: Passive Aggressive Guard
tier3Perks.description: Receive less damage from combatants that are close to you while you are wielding a Glaive.

tier3Perks.name: Void Weapon Channeling
tier3Perks.description: You gain a temporary bonus to Void weapon damage after you defeat a target with a Void weapon while at least one of your Void abilities is fully charged. This damage bonus increases based on the number of fully charged Void abilities you have.

tier3Perks.name: Strand Soldier
tier3Perks.description: Your Strand weapons gain Unraveling Rounds whenever you gain Woven Mail while your Strand or Prismatic subclass is equipped.

tier3Perks.name: Suppressing Glaive
tier3Perks.description: Damaging combatants with your Glaive suppresses them, preventing them from using abilities for a short time.

tier3Perks.name: Protective Breach
tier3Perks.description: Picking up a Void Breach gives you an overshield or refreshes your existing overshield.

tier3Perks.name: Counter Charge
tier3Perks.description: Gain a stack of Armor Charge when you stun a Champion.

tier3Perks.name: Bricks from Beyond
tier3Perks.description: Defeating a powerful combatant with a Void weapon has a chance to generate Heavy ammo progress for you and your teammates.

tier3Perks.name: Overload Grenades
tier3Perks.description: Void grenades disrupt combatants, stunning them, delaying ability energy regeneration and lowering combatant damage output. Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions.

tier3Perks.name: Targeting Autoloader
tier3Perks.description:
While you have an Auto Rifle equipped, defeating combatants reloads your equipped weapon and temporarily increases weapon damage. 

Awards bonus progress when dealing final blows while surrounded.

tier3Perks.name: Improved Unraveling
tier3Perks.description: Increases the amount of damage dealt by unraveling a target.

tier3Perks.name: Volatile Flow
tier3Perks.description: Picking up an Orb of Power grants your Void weapons Volatile rounds.

tier3Perks.name: Unto the Breach
tier3Perks.description: Defeating a Void debuffed target creates a Void Breach while your Void or Prismatic subclass is equipped.

tier3Perks.name: Amped Up
tier3Perks.description: Stay amplified longer while your Arc or Prismatic subclass is equipped.

tier3Perks.name: Thunderous Retort
tier3Perks.description: Grants bonus Arc Super damage if cast while critically wounded or while amplified. Lasts until the end of the Super activation.

tier3Perks.name: Sustained Fire
tier3Perks.description: Continuously damaging combatants or healing allies with an Auto Rifle grants you damage resistance.

tier3Perks.name: Shatter Orbs
tier3Perks.description: The first time you break a combatant's shield, you create an Orb of Power if you break the shield with the matching damage type.

3821685388.name: Tablet of Ruin
3821685388.description:
Works best with:
Elements: [Arc] [Strand] [Void] 
Weapons: [Fusion Rifle] [Glaive] [Trace Rifle]

tier1Perks.name: Hold the Line
tier1Perks.description: While surrounded, Machine Guns and Glaives gain increased reload speed and stability; final blows heal you.

tier1Perks.name: Dielectric
tier1Perks.description:
Defeating [Arc]Arc debuffed targets grants Bolt Charge.

Rapidly defeating Arc debuffed targets spawns an Orb of Power and heals a small portion of health.

tier1Perks.name: Volatile Marksman
tier1Perks.description: Rapid [Void]Void weapon precision hits and rapid Void weapon final blows grant Volatile Rounds. Volatile detonations grant class ability energy.

tier1Perks.name: Unraveling Orbs
tier1Perks.description: Picking up an Orb of Power or a Tangle grants [Strand]Strand weapons Unraveling Rounds.

tier1Perks.name: Photonic Flare
tier1Perks.description:
Defeating an exhausted or severed target with [Arc]Arc damage releases a blinding burst.

Exhausted targets deal reduced outgoing damage.

tier1Perks.name: Elemental Siphon
tier1Perks.description: Rapid final blows with a Kinetic weapon or a weapon matching your equipped Super create an Elemental pickup that matches your equipped Super. Elemental pickups grant matching Super energy when they are collected.

tier1Perks.name: Perpetual Destruction
tier1Perks.description: Rapid final blows with non-Exotic Rocket Launchers refund ammo and increase reload speed for a short duration.

tier2Perks.name: Vile Weave
tier2Perks.description: Targets hit by your Tangles are severed. Reduce Tangle cooldown by picking one up.

tier2Perks.name: Maligned Harvest
tier2Perks.description: Rapidly applying Volatile causes your next instance of [Void]Void weapon damage to create a weakening burst. Applying Weaken provides a small Void Overshield.

tier2Perks.name: Flashover
tier2Perks.description: When you gain maximum Bolt Charge, you also become amplified. Lightning bolts deal more damage.

tier2Perks.name: Horde Shuttle
tier2Perks.description: Damaging unraveled targets with a weapon occasionally spawns a Threadling. Threadlings sever targets that they damage.

tier2Perks.name: No Bell
tier2Perks.description: Rapid Glaive melee final blows grant Special ammo Glaives additional ammo. Blocking damage with Glaives increases their melee damage to targets.

tier2Perks.name: Harsh Refraction
tier2Perks.description: Trace Rifles do more damage to targets afflicted by elemental debuffs matching their element type.

tier2Perks.name: Gold from Lead
tier2Perks.description: Picking up Special ammo has the chance to grant Heavy ammo.

tier2Perks.name: Hold the Line
tier2Perks.description: While surrounded, Machine Guns and Glaives gain increased reload speed and stability; final blows heal you.

tier2Perks.name: Dielectric
tier2Perks.description:
Defeating [Arc]Arc debuffed targets grants Bolt Charge.

Rapidly defeating Arc debuffed targets spawns an Orb of Power and heals a small portion of health.

tier2Perks.name: Volatile Marksman
tier2Perks.description: Rapid [Void]Void weapon precision hits and rapid Void weapon final blows grant Volatile Rounds. Volatile detonations grant class ability energy.

tier2Perks.name: Unraveling Orbs
tier2Perks.description: Picking up an Orb of Power or a Tangle grants [Strand]Strand weapons Unraveling Rounds.

tier2Perks.name: Photonic Flare
tier2Perks.description:
Defeating an exhausted or severed target with [Arc]Arc damage releases a blinding burst.

Exhausted targets deal reduced outgoing damage.

tier2Perks.name: Elemental Siphon
tier2Perks.description: Rapid final blows with a Kinetic weapon or a weapon matching your equipped Super create an Elemental pickup that matches your equipped Super. Elemental pickups grant matching Super energy when they are collected.

tier2Perks.name: Perpetual Destruction
tier2Perks.description: Rapid final blows with non-Exotic Rocket Launchers refund ammo and increase reload speed for a short duration.

tier3Perks.name: Particle Reconstruction
tier3Perks.description: Dealing sustained damage with Fusion Rifles or Linear Fusion Rifles partially refills the magazine from reserves and grants them bonus damage for a short duration against that target.

tier3Perks.name: Elemental Supercharger
tier3Perks.description:
Defeating exhausted or severed targets with weapons that match your Super element grants Super energy.

Exhausted targets deal reduced outgoing damage.

tier3Perks.name: Heavy Ordnance Regeneration
tier3Perks.description: Dealing sustained damage to targets with a Heavy Machine Gun or Rocket Launcher grants damage resistance and increases grenade and melee regeneration for a short duration. While active, defeating powerful combatants disorients nearby rank-and-file combatants.

tier3Perks.name: Defibrillating Blast
tier3Perks.description: Stunning a Champion grants maximum stacks of Bolt Charge. Damaging targets with Bolt Charge bolts jolts them and heals you.

tier3Perks.name: Void Flux
tier3Perks.description:
Defeating weakened targets with a [Void] Void weapon applies Volatile to nearby targets.
Powerful targets increase the radius of the explosion.

tier3Perks.name: Limit Break
tier3Perks.description: Casting a Super while you are critically wounded or have a elemental buff matching your Super element grants a period of increased Super damage.

tier3Perks.name: To Shreds
tier3Perks.description: Dealing sustained damage to severed targets unravels them. Defeating a severed target creates a hotspot of Strand energy, granting Woven Mail to nearby allies for a short duration.

tier3Perks.name: Vile Weave
tier3Perks.description: Targets hit by your Tangles are severed. Reduce Tangle cooldown by picking one up.

tier3Perks.name: Maligned Harvest
tier3Perks.description: Rapidly applying Volatile causes your next instance of [Void]Void weapon damage to create a weakening burst. Applying Weaken provides a small Void Overshield.

tier3Perks.name: Flashover
tier3Perks.description: When you gain maximum Bolt Charge, you also become amplified. Lightning bolts deal more damage.

tier3Perks.name: Horde Shuttle
tier3Perks.description: Damaging unraveled targets with a weapon occasionally spawns a Threadling. Threadlings sever targets that they damage.

tier3Perks.name: No Bell
tier3Perks.description: Rapid Glaive melee final blows grant Special ammo Glaives additional ammo. Blocking damage with Glaives increases their melee damage to targets.

tier3Perks.name: Harsh Refraction
tier3Perks.description: Trace Rifles do more damage to targets afflicted by elemental debuffs matching their element type.

tier3Perks.name: Gold from Lead
tier3Perks.description: Picking up Special ammo has the chance to grant Heavy ammo.

tier3Perks.name: Hold the Line
tier3Perks.description: While surrounded, Machine Guns and Glaives gain increased reload speed and stability; final blows heal you.

tier3Perks.name: Dielectric
tier3Perks.description:
Defeating [Arc]Arc debuffed targets grants Bolt Charge.

Rapidly defeating Arc debuffed targets spawns an Orb of Power and heals a small portion of health.

tier3Perks.name: Volatile Marksman
tier3Perks.description: Rapid [Void]Void weapon precision hits and rapid Void weapon final blows grant Volatile Rounds. Volatile detonations grant class ability energy.

tier3Perks.name: Unraveling Orbs
tier3Perks.description: Picking up an Orb of Power or a Tangle grants [Strand]Strand weapons Unraveling Rounds.

tier3Perks.name: Photonic Flare
tier3Perks.description:
Defeating an exhausted or severed target with [Arc]Arc damage releases a blinding burst.

Exhausted targets deal reduced outgoing damage.

tier3Perks.name: Elemental Siphon
tier3Perks.description: Rapid final blows with a Kinetic weapon or a weapon matching your equipped Super create an Elemental pickup that matches your equipped Super. Elemental pickups grant matching Super energy when they are collected.

tier3Perks.name: Perpetual Destruction
tier3Perks.description: Rapid final blows with non-Exotic Rocket Launchers refund ammo and increase reload speed for a short duration.

1770364095.name: Slayer Baron Apothecary Satchel
1770364095.description:
Works best with:
Elements: [Stasis] [Void] [Arc]
Weapons: [Grenade Launcher] [Special Grenade Launcher] [Shotgun]

tier1Perks.name: Wind Chill
tier1Perks.description: Rapid [Stasis] Stasis weapon hits grant you a stack of Frost Armor; hits against slowed or frozen targets also create a Stasis Shard.

tier1Perks.name: Crystalline Converter
tier1Perks.description:
After activating your class ability, your next [Stasis] Stasis weapon final blow creates a Stasis Shard. 

Gather Stasis Shards to gain stacks of Crystalline Converter, which cause your next powered Stasis melee hit to create Stasis crystals equal to the number of stacks you have.

tier1Perks.name: Total Carnage
tier1Perks.description: After finishing a powerful combatant, gain temporary damage resistance and replenish health.

tier1Perks.name: Power from Pain
tier1Perks.description: Rapid final blows against weakened combatants grants you Devour and creates a Void Breach.

tier1Perks.name: Trace Evidence
tier1Perks.description:
Rapid precision hits or rapid final blows on targets affected by Jolt or Blind will generate Ionic Traces.

Picking up an Ionic Trace grants an Armor Charge.

tier1Perks.name: The Thick of It
tier1Perks.description: Rapid final blows while surrounded grant you Armor Charge. While you are surrounded, your weapons have increased handling; Swords gain increased charge rate.

tier1Perks.name: Killing Breeze
tier1Perks.description: Rapid weapon final blows grant you a bonus to mobility.

tier2Perks.name: Frost Renewal
tier2Perks.description: While you have Frost Armor, taking critical damage releases a burst that freezes nearby combatants and grants Frost Armor to you and nearby allies.

tier2Perks.name: Hail The Storm
tier2Perks.description:
Shattering frozen targets and Stasis crystals deals increased damage.

Shattering Stasis crystals releases shards of ice that damage and slow targets.

tier2Perks.name: Debilitating Wave
tier2Perks.description:
Finishers emit a damaging wave that matches the element of your currently equipped Super.

Arc, Void, and Stasis waves apply Blind, Weaken, and Slow respectively.

tier2Perks.name: Weakened Clear
tier2Perks.description: When using a Grenade Launcher, damaging a boss, damaging a Champion, or breaking a combatant's shield reloads your stowed weapons and weakens the combatant.

tier2Perks.name: Retinal Burn
tier2Perks.description: Rapid [Arc] Arc weapon precision hits consume an Armor Charge to trigger a blinding burst at the target's location.

tier2Perks.name: Curative Orbs
tier2Perks.description:
The first time you break a target's shield or break the shield of a Guardian using their Super, you create an Orb of Power.

Collecting an Elemental pickup, collecting an Orb of Power, or destroying a Tangle grants you a small amount of health.

tier2Perks.name: Void Renewal
tier2Perks.description:
While Devour is active, [Void] Void weapon final blows have a chance to generate a Void Breach.

Picking up a Void Breach increases weapon reload and handling; Shotguns and Grenade Launchers are also reloaded from reserves.

tier2Perks.name: Wind Chill
tier2Perks.description: Rapid [Stasis] Stasis weapon hits grant you a stack of Frost Armor; hits against slowed or frozen targets also create a Stasis Shard.

tier2Perks.name: Crystalline Converter
tier2Perks.description:
After activating your class ability, your next [Stasis] Stasis weapon final blow creates a Stasis Shard. 

Gather Stasis Shards to gain stacks of Crystalline Converter, which cause your next powered Stasis melee hit to create Stasis crystals equal to the number of stacks you have.

tier2Perks.name: Total Carnage
tier2Perks.description: After finishing a powerful combatant, gain temporary damage resistance and replenish health.

tier2Perks.name: Power from Pain
tier2Perks.description: Rapid final blows against weakened combatants grants you Devour and creates a Void Breach.

tier2Perks.name: Trace Evidence
tier2Perks.description:
Rapid precision hits or rapid final blows on targets affected by Jolt or Blind will generate Ionic Traces.

Picking up an Ionic Trace grants an Armor Charge.

tier2Perks.name: The Thick of It
tier2Perks.description: Rapid final blows while surrounded grant you Armor Charge. While you are surrounded, your weapons have increased handling; Swords gain increased charge rate.

tier2Perks.name: Killing Breeze
tier2Perks.description: Rapid weapon final blows grant you a bonus to mobility.

tier3Perks.name: Brain Freeze
tier3Perks.description: Frozen combatants become surrounded by chilling fog, which slows combatants that aren't already.

tier3Perks.name: Supernova
tier3Perks.description: Picking up a Void Breach causes your next source of Void damage to create a large weakening pulse.

tier3Perks.name: Conductive Cosmic Crystal
tier3Perks.description: Your [Arc] Arc and [Void] Void abilities deal bonus damage to targets that are affected by a [Stasis] Stasis debuff.

tier3Perks.name: Served Cold
tier3Perks.description:
Picking up a [Stasis] Stasis Shard grants you class ability energy. 

Picking up a [Void] Void Breach grants you melee energy.

tier3Perks.name: Kinetic Impacts
tier3Perks.description:
Sustained damage with a Grenade Launcher increases the reload speed of Grenade Launchers and triggers a damaging Kinetic shockwave.

This shockwave can stun [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

tier3Perks.name: Arc Compounding
tier3Perks.description: [Arc] Arc sources deal increased damage to Blind targets.

tier3Perks.name: Old God's Rite
tier3Perks.description: After picking up a [Void] Void Breach, dealing damage with a Void weapon creates a rain of seeking projectiles.

tier3Perks.name: Frost Renewal
tier3Perks.description: While you have Frost Armor, taking critical damage releases a burst that freezes nearby combatants and grants Frost Armor to you and nearby allies.

tier3Perks.name: Hail The Storm
tier3Perks.description:
Shattering frozen targets and Stasis crystals deals increased damage.

Shattering Stasis crystals releases shards of ice that damage and slow targets.

tier3Perks.name: Debilitating Wave
tier3Perks.description:
Finishers emit a damaging wave that matches the element of your currently equipped Super.

Arc, Void, and Stasis waves apply Blind, Weaken, and Slow respectively.

tier3Perks.name: Weakened Clear
tier3Perks.description: When using a Grenade Launcher, damaging a boss, damaging a Champion, or breaking a combatant's shield reloads your stowed weapons and weakens the combatant.

tier3Perks.name: Retinal Burn
tier3Perks.description: Rapid [Arc] Arc weapon precision hits consume an Armor Charge to trigger a blinding burst at the target's location.

tier3Perks.name: Curative Orbs
tier3Perks.description:
The first time you break a target's shield or break the shield of a Guardian using their Super, you create an Orb of Power.

Collecting an Elemental pickup, collecting an Orb of Power, or destroying a Tangle grants you a small amount of health.

tier3Perks.name: Void Renewal
tier3Perks.description:
While Devour is active, [Void] Void weapon final blows have a chance to generate a Void Breach.

Picking up a Void Breach increases weapon reload and handling; Shotguns and Grenade Launchers are also reloaded from reserves.

tier3Perks.name: Wind Chill
tier3Perks.description: Rapid [Stasis] Stasis weapon hits grant you a stack of Frost Armor; hits against slowed or frozen targets also create a Stasis Shard.

tier3Perks.name: Crystalline Converter
tier3Perks.description:
After activating your class ability, your next [Stasis] Stasis weapon final blow creates a Stasis Shard. 

Gather Stasis Shards to gain stacks of Crystalline Converter, which cause your next powered Stasis melee hit to create Stasis crystals equal to the number of stacks you have.

tier3Perks.name: Total Carnage
tier3Perks.description: After finishing a powerful combatant, gain temporary damage resistance and replenish health.

tier3Perks.name: Power from Pain
tier3Perks.description: Rapid final blows against weakened combatants grants you Devour and creates a Void Breach.

tier3Perks.name: Trace Evidence
tier3Perks.description:
Rapid precision hits or rapid final blows on targets affected by Jolt or Blind will generate Ionic Traces.

Picking up an Ionic Trace grants an Armor Charge.

tier3Perks.name: The Thick of It
tier3Perks.description: Rapid final blows while surrounded grant you Armor Charge. While you are surrounded, your weapons have increased handling; Swords gain increased charge rate.

tier3Perks.name: Killing Breeze
tier3Perks.description: Rapid weapon final blows grant you a bonus to mobility.

2180638678.name: Hunter's Journal
2180638678.description:
Works best with:
Elements:  [Solar] [Arc] [Void]
Weapons: [Sword] [Sniper Rifle] [Auto Rifle]

tier1Perks.name: Elemental Siphon
tier1Perks.description: Rapid final blows with a Kinetic weapon or a weapon matching your equipped Super create an Elemental pickup that matches your equipped Super.

tier1Perks.name: Energy Diffusion Substrate
tier1Perks.description: Gain a small amount of resistance to all damage dealt to you by combatants.

tier1Perks.name: Creeping Chill
tier1Perks.description: Stasis final blows against slowed or frozen targets release a burst that slows combatants and grants Frost Armor to allies caught in the blast.

tier1Perks.name: Press The Advantage
tier1Perks.description: Breaking a combatant's shield grants increased weapon stability, handling, and reload speed. Swords gain increased guard resistance.

tier1Perks.name: Threaded Blast
tier1Perks.description: Destroying a Tangle with a Strand weapon creates a larger and more damaging explosion.

tier1Perks.name: Incendiary Rifle Rounds
tier1Perks.description: Solar Sniper Rifle precision hits scorch targets.

tier1Perks.name: Sustained Fire
tier1Perks.description: Continuously damaging combatants or healing allies with an Auto Rifle grants you damage resistance.

tier2Perks.name: Counter Energy
tier2Perks.description: When you or a member of your fireteam stuns a champion, you gain energy for your least-charged ability.

tier2Perks.name: Blade Stamina
tier2Perks.description: Rapidly defeating combatants with a Sword refunds some ammo.

tier2Perks.name: Void Hegemony
tier2Perks.description: While you have a Void or Prismatic subclass equipped, defeating weakened targets provides a small Void Overshield.

tier2Perks.name: Radiant Orbs
tier2Perks.description: While you have a Solar or Prismatic subclass equipped, picking up an Orb of Power makes you radiant.

tier2Perks.name: Bad Amplitude
tier2Perks.description: Damaging a Champion with an Arc ability causes the Champion to become jolted.

tier2Perks.name: Solar Fulmination
tier2Perks.description: Your ignitions do increased damage in an increased radius.

tier2Perks.name: Targeting Autoloader
tier2Perks.description:
While you have an Auto Rifle equipped, defeating combatants reloads your equipped weapon and temporarily increases weapon damage. 

Awards bonus progress when dealing final blows while surrounded.

tier2Perks.name: Elemental Siphon
tier2Perks.description: Rapid final blows with a Kinetic weapon or a weapon matching your equipped Super create an Elemental pickup that matches your equipped Super.

tier2Perks.name: Energy Diffusion Substrate
tier2Perks.description: Gain a small amount of resistance to all damage dealt to you by combatants.

tier2Perks.name: Creeping Chill
tier2Perks.description: Stasis final blows against slowed or frozen targets release a burst that slows combatants and grants Frost Armor to allies caught in the blast.

tier2Perks.name: Press The Advantage
tier2Perks.description: Breaking a combatant's shield grants increased weapon stability, handling, and reload speed. Swords gain increased guard resistance.

tier2Perks.name: Threaded Blast
tier2Perks.description: Destroying a Tangle with a Strand weapon creates a larger and more damaging explosion.

tier2Perks.name: Incendiary Rifle Rounds
tier2Perks.description: Solar Sniper Rifle precision hits scorch targets.

tier2Perks.name: Sustained Fire
tier2Perks.description: Continuously damaging combatants or healing allies with an Auto Rifle grants you damage resistance.

tier3Perks.name: Prismatic Transfer
tier3Perks.description: When you cast your Super, each member of your fireteam with a Super type different than yours gains a bonus to weapon damage.

tier3Perks.name: Argent Blade
tier3Perks.description: While you have Armor Charge, dealing damage with a Sword consumes an Armor Charge and empowers your Sword for a short time, granting it bonus damage and energy charge rate.

tier3Perks.name: Expanding Abyss
tier3Perks.description: Void sources deal increased damage to weakened targets.

tier3Perks.name: Shieldcrush
tier3Perks.description:
While you have Woven Mail, Frost Armor, or a Void Overshield, your melee recharges faster and deals increased damage.

While you are amplified or radiant, your grenade recharges faster and deals increased damage.

tier3Perks.name: Transference
tier3Perks.description:
Gain increased grenade and melee damage while transcendent.

Weapon final blows while transcendent refund Light and Dark energy after Transcendence ends.

tier3Perks.name: Sniper's Meditation
tier3Perks.description: Sniper Rifle hits grant stacking Sniper Rifle damage, stability, and reload bonuses for a short time. Heavy ammo Sniper Rifle hits count as more than one.

tier3Perks.name: Shock and Awe
tier3Perks.description: When you have an Arc or Prismatic subclass equipped, Arc final blows while you are amplified summon a burst of lightning that damages and jolts targets.

tier3Perks.name: Counter Energy
tier3Perks.description: When you or a member of your fireteam stuns a champion, you gain energy for your least-charged ability.

tier3Perks.name: Blade Stamina
tier3Perks.description: Rapidly defeating combatants with a Sword refunds some ammo.

tier3Perks.name: Void Hegemony
tier3Perks.description: While you have a Void or Prismatic subclass equipped, defeating weakened targets provides a small Void Overshield.

tier3Perks.name: Radiant Orbs
tier3Perks.description: While you have a Solar or Prismatic subclass equipped, picking up an Orb of Power makes you radiant.

tier3Perks.name: Bad Amplitude
tier3Perks.description: Damaging a Champion with an Arc ability causes the Champion to become jolted.

tier3Perks.name: Solar Fulmination
tier3Perks.description: Your ignitions do increased damage in an increased radius.

tier3Perks.name: Targeting Autoloader
tier3Perks.description:
While you have an Auto Rifle equipped, defeating combatants reloads your equipped weapon and temporarily increases weapon damage. 

Awards bonus progress when dealing final blows while surrounded.

tier3Perks.name: Elemental Siphon
tier3Perks.description: Rapid final blows with a Kinetic weapon or a weapon matching your equipped Super create an Elemental pickup that matches your equipped Super.

tier3Perks.name: Energy Diffusion Substrate
tier3Perks.description: Gain a small amount of resistance to all damage dealt to you by combatants.

tier3Perks.name: Creeping Chill
tier3Perks.description: Stasis final blows against slowed or frozen targets release a burst that slows combatants and grants Frost Armor to allies caught in the blast.

tier3Perks.name: Press The Advantage
tier3Perks.description: Breaking a combatant's shield grants increased weapon stability, handling, and reload speed. Swords gain increased guard resistance.

tier3Perks.name: Threaded Blast
tier3Perks.description: Destroying a Tangle with a Strand weapon creates a larger and more damaging explosion.

tier3Perks.name: Incendiary Rifle Rounds
tier3Perks.description: Solar Sniper Rifle precision hits scorch targets.

tier3Perks.name: Sustained Fire
tier3Perks.description: Continuously damaging combatants or healing allies with an Auto Rifle grants you damage resistance.

tier1Perks.name: Fever and Chill
tier1Perks.description: Rapid precision hits with [Solar]Solar weapons grant Radiant. Rapid precision hits with [Stasis]Stasis weapons grant Frost Armor.

tier1Perks.name: Elemental Benevolence
tier1Perks.description: Granting allies an elemental buff gives class ability energy.

tier1Perks.name: Frost Renewal
tier1Perks.description: While you have Frost Armor, taking critical damage releases a burst that freezes nearby combatants and grants Frost Armor to you and nearby allies.

tier1Perks.name: Horde Shuttle
tier1Perks.description: Damaging unraveled targets with a weapon occasionally spawns a Threadling. Threadlings sever targets that they damage.

tier1Perks.name: Refresh Threads
tier1Perks.description: Picking up an Elemental pickup matching your subclass element or picking up a Tangle while you have a [Strand]Strand Super equipped grants energy to your least charged ability.

tier1Perks.name: Pack Tactics
tier1Perks.description: Dealing damage with Threadlings increases Threadling damage. At maximum stacks, Threadlings stun [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

tier1Perks.name: Semi-Auto Striker
tier1Perks.description: If you have fewer than 2 stacks of Armor Charge, rapid precision shots with Bows, Snipers, and Scout Rifles generate an Armor Charge.

tier2Perks.name: Threaded Blast
tier2Perks.description: Destroying a Tangle with [Strand]Strand damage increases the radius of the explosion and its damage.

tier2Perks.name: Cauterized Darkness
tier2Perks.description: [Stasis]Stasis or [Strand] Strand debuffed non-boss combatants take increased [Solar]Solar damage from all sources.

tier2Perks.name: Elemental Daze
tier2Perks.description: Stunning a Champion with an elemental weapon creates an elementally aligned explosion, applying a matching elemental debuff to them and nearby targets.

tier2Perks.name: Shoulder to Shoulder
tier2Perks.description: Dealing sustained precision damage against combatants while near two or more allies grants you damage resistance.

tier2Perks.name: Elemental Coalescence
tier2Perks.description: Defeating targets has the chance to create an Elemental pickup matching your equipped Super element.

tier2Perks.name: That Fresh Bullets Smell
tier2Perks.description: Picking up an ammo brick gives your Kinetic weapons increased damage for a short duration.

tier2Perks.name: Energy Acceleration
tier2Perks.description: Sustained damage with micro-missiles causes the combatant to emit a Kinetic shockwave that damages nearby combatants. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

tier2Perks.name: Fever and Chill
tier2Perks.description: Rapid precision hits with [Solar]Solar weapons grant Radiant. Rapid precision hits with [Stasis]Stasis weapons grant Frost Armor.

tier2Perks.name: Elemental Benevolence
tier2Perks.description: Granting allies an elemental buff gives class ability energy.

tier2Perks.name: Frost Renewal
tier2Perks.description: While you have Frost Armor, taking critical damage releases a burst that freezes nearby combatants and grants Frost Armor to you and nearby allies.

tier2Perks.name: Horde Shuttle
tier2Perks.description: Damaging unraveled targets with a weapon occasionally spawns a Threadling. Threadlings sever targets that they damage.

tier2Perks.name: Refresh Threads
tier2Perks.description: Picking up an Elemental pickup matching your subclass element or picking up a Tangle while you have a [Strand]Strand Super equipped grants energy to your least charged ability.

tier2Perks.name: Pack Tactics
tier2Perks.description: Dealing damage with Threadlings increases Threadling damage. At maximum stacks, Threadlings stun [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

tier2Perks.name: Semi-Auto Striker
tier2Perks.description: If you have fewer than 2 stacks of Armor Charge, rapid precision shots with Bows, Snipers, and Scout Rifles generate an Armor Charge.

tier3Perks.name: Radiant Shrapnel
tier3Perks.description: Dealing sustained weapon damage while Radiant or defeating a scorched combatant with a weapon causes the target to release Solar projectiles that deal damage and scorch on impact.

tier3Perks.name: Shieldcrush
tier3Perks.description:
While you have Woven Mail, Frost Armor, or a Void overshield, your melee recharges faster and deals increased damage.

While you are Amplified or Radiant, your grenade recharges faster and deals increased damage.

tier3Perks.name: Elemental Overdrive
tier3Perks.description: Picking up an Elemental pickup or Tangle grants increased damage to weapons of the same element.

tier3Perks.name: Tangled Web
tier3Perks.description: Creating a Tangle by defeating a [Strand]Strand debuffed target suspends nearby combatants.

tier3Perks.name: Frigid Glare
tier3Perks.description: While Frost Armor is active, [Stasis]Stasis precision final blows cause combatants to release a freezing burst.

tier3Perks.name: Iron Lord's Vigor
tier3Perks.description: While wielding a Sword, you take decreased damage; rapid final blows grant ammo to the wielder.

tier3Perks.name: Argent Quiver
tier3Perks.description: Reloading a Bow consumes one stack of Armor Charge, granting increased damage and reload speed for your next 3 shots or until you stow your Bow.

tier3Perks.name: Threaded Blast
tier3Perks.description: Destroying a Tangle with [Strand]Strand damage increases the radius of the explosion and its damage.

tier3Perks.name: Cauterized Darkness
tier3Perks.description: [Stasis]Stasis or [Strand] Strand debuffed non-boss combatants take increased [Solar]Solar damage from all sources.

tier3Perks.name: Elemental Daze
tier3Perks.description: Stunning a Champion with an elemental weapon creates an elementally aligned explosion, applying a matching elemental debuff to them and nearby targets.

tier3Perks.name: Shoulder to Shoulder
tier3Perks.description: Dealing sustained precision damage against combatants while near two or more allies grants you damage resistance.

tier3Perks.name: Elemental Coalescence
tier3Perks.description: Defeating targets has the chance to create an Elemental pickup matching your equipped Super element.

tier3Perks.name: That Fresh Bullets Smell
tier3Perks.description: Picking up an ammo brick gives your Kinetic weapons increased damage for a short duration.

tier3Perks.name: Energy Acceleration
tier3Perks.description: Sustained damage with micro-missiles causes the combatant to emit a Kinetic shockwave that damages nearby combatants. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

tier3Perks.name: Fever and Chill
tier3Perks.description: Rapid precision hits with [Solar]Solar weapons grant Radiant. Rapid precision hits with [Stasis]Stasis weapons grant Frost Armor.

tier3Perks.name: Elemental Benevolence
tier3Perks.description: Granting allies an elemental buff gives class ability energy.

tier3Perks.name: Frost Renewal
tier3Perks.description: While you have Frost Armor, taking critical damage releases a burst that freezes nearby combatants and grants Frost Armor to you and nearby allies.

tier3Perks.name: Horde Shuttle
tier3Perks.description: Damaging unraveled targets with a weapon occasionally spawns a Threadling. Threadlings sever targets that they damage.

tier3Perks.name: Refresh Threads
tier3Perks.description: Picking up an Elemental pickup matching your subclass element or picking up a Tangle while you have a [Strand]Strand Super equipped grants energy to your least charged ability.

tier3Perks.name: Pack Tactics
tier3Perks.description: Dealing damage with Threadlings increases Threadling damage. At maximum stacks, Threadlings stun [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

tier3Perks.name: Semi-Auto Striker
tier3Perks.description: If you have fewer than 2 stacks of Armor Charge, rapid precision shots with Bows, Snipers, and Scout Rifles generate an Armor Charge.

1014202826.name: Encrypted Data Disk
1014202826.description:
Works best with:
Elements: [Kill] [Void] [Arc] 
Weapons: [Sword] [Sniper Rifle] [Machine Gun]

tier1Perks.name: Press The Advantage
tier1Perks.description: Breaking a combatant's shield grants increased weapon stability, handling, and reload speed. Swords gain increased guard resistance.

tier1Perks.name: Kinetic Synthesis
tier1Perks.description: Sustained Kinetic weapon damage and rapid final blows have a chance to generate a unique ammo brick. Collecting this brick will grant ammo to equipped Kinetic damage weapons and grant Special and Heavy ammo progress.

tier1Perks.name: Reload at Range
tier1Perks.description: Precision hits with Bows and Sniper Rifles grant a stacking bonus to their reload speed.

tier1Perks.name: Riposte
tier1Perks.description: Shortly after guarding with a Sword, your light and heavy attacks stun unshielded combatants. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

tier1Perks.name: Power from Pain
tier1Perks.description: Rapid final blows against weakened combatants grant you Devour.

tier1Perks.name: Fierce Proxemics
tier1Perks.description: Finisher final blows grant grenade and melee energy.

tier1Perks.name: Rapid Remedy
tier1Perks.description: Machine Gun rapid final blows heal you.

tier2Perks.name: Dielectric
tier2Perks.description:
Defeating [Arc]Arc debuffed targets grants Bolt Charge.

Rapidly defeating Arc debuffed targets spawns an Orb of Power and heals a small portion of health.

tier2Perks.name: Armorsmith
tier2Perks.description: Breaking a combatant's shield temporarily grants you damage resistance and increased melee damage.

tier2Perks.name: Counter Energy
tier2Perks.description: When you or a member of your fireteam stuns a champion, you gain energy for your least-charged ability.

tier2Perks.name: Combination Argent Blade
tier2Perks.description: Briefly pause after executing a light attack, then follow it up with a light or heavy attack to empower your Sword for a short time, granting it bonus damage and charge rate.

tier2Perks.name: Singularity Blade
tier2Perks.description: While you have a Void elemental buff, melee and Sword hits weaken targets, while melee and Sword final blows create a weakening burst.

tier2Perks.name: Blinding Jolts
tier2Perks.description: Final blows on jolted combatants blind nearby combatants.

tier2Perks.name: Precision Equity
tier2Perks.description: Precision final blows build progress towards a large Orb of Power that also grants bonus weapon damage on pickup. Higher ranked targets grant more progress.

tier2Perks.name: Press The Advantage
tier2Perks.description: Breaking a combatant's shield grants increased weapon stability, handling, and reload speed. Swords gain increased guard resistance.

tier2Perks.name: Kinetic Synthesis
tier2Perks.description: Sustained Kinetic weapon damage and rapid final blows have a chance to generate a unique ammo brick. Collecting this brick will grant ammo to equipped Kinetic damage weapons and grant Special and Heavy ammo progress.

tier2Perks.name: Reload at Range
tier2Perks.description: Precision hits with Bows and Sniper Rifles grant a stacking bonus to their reload speed.

tier2Perks.name: Riposte
tier2Perks.description: Shortly after guarding with a Sword, your light and heavy attacks stun unshielded combatants. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

tier2Perks.name: Power from Pain
tier2Perks.description: Rapid final blows against weakened combatants grant you Devour.

tier2Perks.name: Fierce Proxemics
tier2Perks.description: Finisher final blows grant grenade and melee energy.

tier2Perks.name: Rapid Remedy
tier2Perks.description: Machine Gun rapid final blows heal you.

tier3Perks.name: Elemental Orbs: Arc
tier3Perks.description: [Arc]Arc weapon final blows have a chance to spawn an Arc Elemental Orb. Arc Orbs can be thrown or shot to create an Arc explosion that jolts targets it damages.

tier3Perks.name: Kinetic Rupture
tier3Perks.description: Kinetic weapon damage against a powerful combatant has a chance to create a Kinetic Rupture. Targeting this Rupture causes a damaging explosion that staggers combatants. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

tier3Perks.name: Sniper's Meditation
tier3Perks.description: Sniper Rifle hits grant stacking Sniper Rifle damage, stability, and reload bonuses for a short time. Heavy ammo Sniper Rifle hits count as more than one hit.

tier3Perks.name: Sword Storm Combo
tier3Perks.description: Performing three Sword light attacks followed by a heavy attack summons penumbral blades that surround you to damage and disorient combatants. Sword final blows extend the duration of these penumbral blades.

tier3Perks.name: Void Infestation
tier3Perks.description: Defeating a weakened target spawns a tracking projectile that weakens other targets.

tier3Perks.name: Tazer Tag
tier3Perks.description: Arc-powered melee hits jolt combatants and deal further damage for a short duration.

tier3Perks.name: Sticker Shock
tier3Perks.description: Arc Flux, Magnetic, and Fusion Grenades deal more damage when attached to combatants; on final blows, they release several micro-missiles that seek nearby combatants.

tier3Perks.name: Dielectric
tier3Perks.description:
Defeating [Arc]Arc debuffed targets grants Bolt Charge.

Rapidly defeating Arc debuffed targets spawns an Orb of Power and heals a small portion of health.

tier3Perks.name: Armorsmith
tier3Perks.description: Breaking a combatant's shield temporarily grants you damage resistance and increased melee damage.

tier3Perks.name: Counter Energy
tier3Perks.description: When you or a member of your fireteam stuns a champion, you gain energy for your least-charged ability.

tier3Perks.name: Combination Argent Blade
tier3Perks.description: Briefly pause after executing a light attack, then follow it up with a light or heavy attack to empower your Sword for a short time, granting it bonus damage and charge rate.

tier3Perks.name: Singularity Blade
tier3Perks.description: While you have a Void elemental buff, melee and Sword hits weaken targets, while melee and Sword final blows create a weakening burst.

tier3Perks.name: Blinding Jolts
tier3Perks.description: Final blows on jolted combatants blind nearby combatants.

tier3Perks.name: Precision Equity
tier3Perks.description: Precision final blows build progress towards a large Orb of Power that also grants bonus weapon damage on pickup. Higher ranked targets grant more progress.

tier3Perks.description: Sustained Kinetic weapon damage and rapid final blows have a chance to generate a unique ammo brick. Collecting this brick will grant ammo to equipped Kinetic damage weapons and grant Special and Heavy ammo progress.

tier3Perks.description: Precision hits with Bows and Sniper Rifles grant a stacking bonus to their reload speed.

tier3Perks.description: Shortly after guarding with a Sword, your light and heavy attacks stun unshielded combatants. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

tier3Perks.name: Power from Pain
tier3Perks.description: Rapid final blows against weakened combatants grant you Devour.

tier3Perks.name: Fierce Proxemics
tier3Perks.description: Finisher final blows grant grenade and melee energy.

tier3Perks.name: Rapid Remedy
tier3Perks.description: Machine Gun rapid final blows heal you.
